title: scaffold_harness.sh 可生成合规 harness
verify: ROOT="$(pwd)" && tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/trinity-scaffold-XXXXXX) && (cd "$tmpdir" && bash "$ROOT/project-harness-guards/scripts/scaffold_harness.sh" --install-guards && bash init.sh && bash scripts/run_drift_check.sh)

title: 所有 skill 脚本通过 node --check
CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / harness/goal.md 内容完整
tests/ 目录存在并包含至少一个可运行测试
codemap.js v2: 无假阳性 + repo profile 检测 + 非源码关键文件清单
verify: node dev-project-harness-loop/scripts/codemap.js . --force --output harness/artifacts/codemap.md && rg 'PATCH /path|Server Component' harness/artifacts/codemap.md && exit 1 || exit 0

title: codemap.js v3: 职责分层 + 文档/脚本跨目录引用
verify: node dev-project-harness-loop/scripts/codemap.js . --force --output harness/artifacts/codemap.md && rg '职责分层（Role Map）|跨目录引用（文档 / 脚本显式提及）' harness/artifacts/codemap.md && rg '"version": 3|"roleLayers":|"docCrossRefs":' harness/artifacts/codemap.meta.json

title: harness.js 默认单 story 调度，并对过大 feature 执行 split gate
notes: Batch 1 of Minimal Ralph Upgrade: select one runnable feature from features.json, block size=L / split_required stories from direct dispatch, and keep multi-agent only for clearly independent high-complexity work.
verify: node --check dev-project-harness-loop/scripts/harness.js && node dev-project-harness-loop/scripts/context-assembler/context-assembler.js . "pick next feature from features queue"

title: harness.js 每轮自动把学习写回 repo 的 AGENTS.md Learnings 区块
notes: Batch 2 of Minimal Ralph Upgrade: appendRoundLearning() 在每轮结果落盘后自动把 entry 写入 repo AGENTS.md 的 <!-- LEARNINGS_BLOCK --> 区块。格式：日期 + roundOutcome + blocker + Insight + Evidence。

title: features.json acceptanceCriteria 进入 harness 的 oracle / contract / report 主链
notes: Batch 3 of Minimal Ralph Upgrade: structure acceptanceCriteria, compile featureOracle, feed continueGate/masterBrief/sprint contract/report, and surface acceptance count in ContextAssembler.

acceptanceCriteria.title: selected feature acceptanceCriteria 被编译为 featureOracle 并覆盖 generic local/final oracle
sprint contract / post-task report / ACTIVE 都显式显示 feature acceptance 信息
ContextAssembler 在 unfinished feature 摘要中带出 acceptanceCriteria 数量
